title: Пофиксить оплату
body: Оплата иногда не работает. Надо срочно пофиксить как обсуждали.
author: Maria PM

title: Обновить профиль пользователя
body:
## Контекст
Пользователь не понимает, где изменить email.

## Ожидаемый результат
В профиле появляется понятная ссылка на изменение email.

## Критерии приёмки
- Ссылка видна авторизованному пользователю.
- При клике открывается форма изменения email.

Как обсуждали, финальный текст подсказки согласуем позже.
author: Olga Product

title: Bug: 3DS payment returns user to loading state
body:
## Context
After successful 3DS confirmation, some buyers return to checkout and see an endless loading state. This blocks paid orders and increases support tickets.

## Steps to reproduce
- Start card payment as a buyer.
- Complete 3DS confirmation in the bank flow.
- Return to checkout.

## Actual result
Checkout stays in loading state and the order is not visibly confirmed.

## Expected result
The buyer sees the success page, and the order status is paid.

## Acceptance criteria
- Successful 3DS redirects the buyer to the success page.
- The order status changes to paid.
- Bank errors show a clear retry message.
- QA checks desktop and mobile checkout.
author: Maria PM

title: Story: checkout success page explains payment status
body:
## Context
Buyers need a clear confirmation after payment, because support receives questions about whether the order was paid.

## User story
As a buyer, I want to see a success page after payment, so that I know my order is paid and what happens next.

## Expected result
After successful payment, the buyer sees order number, paid status, delivery summary, and next step.

## Acceptance criteria
- Success page shows order number and paid status.
- Delivery summary is visible for delivery orders.
- The page has a retry-safe state after refresh.
- QA checks desktop, mobile, and a11y labels.
author: Olga Product

title: Add email change hint to user profile
body:
## Context
Users contact support because they cannot find where to change email. The profile page should make the path visible.

## Expected result
An authenticated user sees a clear email change hint near the email field and can open the change flow.

## Acceptance criteria
- Hint is visible only to authenticated users.
- Hint text explains that email confirmation is required.
- Clicking the hint opens the email change flow.
- QA checks roles, mobile layout, and blocked account state.
author: Maria PM

title: Task: add payment error analytics event
body:
## Context
The team cannot see which payment errors happen most often. Analytics will help prioritize fixes by real user impact.

## Expected result
When a payment fails, the system sends an analytics event with error type, payment method, checkout step, and platform.

## Acceptance criteria
- Event is sent for bank decline, timeout, and provider error.
- Event does not include card number or personal data.
- QA checks web and mobile checkout.
- Analytics dashboard receives the event in staging.
author: Maria PM
